title: grammitis calolepis
intro: Grammitis calolepis, also known as the 'Wishbone Fern', is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grammitis calolepis are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Grammitis calolepis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
